summary: Kenneth Suna presents a list of six monthly dividend-paying ETFs with their yields, performance metrics, and monthly payment amounts. The content is educational but focuses on passive dividend investing rather than active options strategies like covered calls, cash-secured puts, or wheels that Brian's Premium Desk employs.
takeaways: DEZ pays 5 cents/month at 2.45% dividend yield
Q6 is a NASDAQ 100 dividend multiplier using futures contracts, yields 4.57%
IDVO international dividend fund yields 5.34% paying 19 cents/month
DIV super dividend fund yields 6.88% but has D+ dividend grade and is down 8%
SDIV global super dividend ETF yields 9.56% with D+ grade, pays 19 cents/month
Expense ratios under 1% are considered low
title: 6 MONTHLY dividend paying ETFs #shorts
